{{Quote|There's a network of underground pipelines. Rumor says they stretch kilometers beneath Coronet City. All of it Selonian territory.|[[Darbin Sull]]|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
The '''Selonian Tunnels''' was the name given to groups of subterranean tunnels constructed by [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] immigrants to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They were inhabited by peoples of all species with the network extending to beneath [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]].

==History==
{{Quote|The rebels are down there, collaborating with the Selonians. They're following the orders of Murthil, a vicious warrior, and the Selonians' den mother.|[[Darth Decimus]]|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic" />}}
In the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], the peace created by the [[Treaty of Coruscant]] was shattered when the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] [[Battle of Corellia|invaded]] Corellia and led to renewed hostilities with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The native [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] rebellion was noted to have fled into the Selonian tunnel network and were being aided by the Selonian [[Murthil]]. In addition, [[Darth Thanaton]] intended to secure a victory in the [[Kaggath (Galactic War)|Kaggath]] against [[Sith Inquisitor]] [[Darth Nox|Kallig]] by destroying a Republic fuel refinery through the use of the Selonian tunnels. This act would have damaged Kallig's reputation as the refinery's fuel was intended for the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] forces and would have ensured Thanaton's success in the [[Kaggath]].

During the [[Corellian Crisis|Corellian Insurrection]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was led through many of these tunnels by the Selonian [[Dracmus]].
